title: diacheirizomai #1315
definition:
1) to move by the use of the hands, take in hand, manage,
    administer, govern
 2) to lay hands on, slay, kill [with one's own hand]
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to move by the use of the hands, take in hand, manage,
    administer, govern
 2) to lay hands on, slay, kill [with one's own hand]

    NASB:  to have in hand, thus to lay hands on (violently):
